body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Addresses #294 


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
Checked off from list in #294. The changes amount to the following.
- adds preferred installation via `add CalibrateEmulateSample`
- removes instructions to build pycall as this is now down within instantiation
- adds links to relevant EKP docs/examples for julia-free forward models
- adds detail to contribution sections for emulators (e.g. types), along with link in how-to-contribute pages
- adds diplomatic sentence to encourage users to try different emulators to explore tradeoffs.
- adds sentences to describe why one might want `noise_learn = true` for GP
- adds more clarifications to some of the RF optimizer options
- adds more detail into the RF kernel selection to avoid huge numbers of hyperparameters
- updates language in `sample.md` from the python-ic description, 
- Add detail about `Chains`
- clears up all noted typos in issue
- adds the `GaussianProcess()` docstring to the API

updated docs [here](https://clima.github.io/CalibrateEmulateSample.jl/previews/PR296/)

<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: JOSS docs updates
